ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Proceedings not reported.
